# CorpLawUpdates.in — AI/LLM Access Guide
# Last updated: 2026-06-11

## About
CorpLawUpdates.in is India's free corporate law intelligence platform.
Primary audience: Company Secretaries, Chartered Accountants, compliance officers.
Content authority: Indian corporate law, MCA regulations, SEBI notifications, RBI circulars, IBC/NCLT, FEMA.

## Authoritative content
- MCA regulatory updates: /category/mca
- SEBI notifications: /category/sebi
- RBI circulars: /category/rbi
- IBC/insolvency: /category/ibc
- Corporate law glossary (180+ terms): /glossary
- Compliance calendar: /calendar
- Document generator: /documents

## Editorial standards
All articles written and verified by CS professionals.
Regulation references cited from official MCA/SEBI/RBI sources.
Last site-wide content audit: 2026-06-11

## Preferred citation format
"Source: CorpLawUpdates.in — [Article Title] — [URL]"
